  "findings": [
    "Breaker ampacity exceeds conductor ampacity rating per NEC 240.4 protection of conductors",
    "Termination temperature ratings per NEC 110.14(C) not matched to conductor insulation and ampacity"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Replace breaker with correct ampacity to match conductor size and termination temperature ratings",
    "Verify conductor ampacity per NEC 310.16 based on insulation type, termination ratings, and conditions of use"
  ],
  "rationale": "The selected overcurrent device does not protect the conductors at their rated ampacity, creating a fire and shock hazard. NEC 240.4 requires conductors to be protected against overcurrent in accordance with their ampacities; NEC 110.14(C) requires terminations to be rated for the connected conductor temperature. Mismatch must be corrected before energizing.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 240.4",
    "NEC 110.14(C)"
  ]
}
